reviews.comment:
La atencion es buena ( como en la mayoria ) pero mas de 10 minutos para cargar ...muy lento . La nafta no es la mas barata como en otras . Ni sistema para cargar puntos. Solo cargo de urgencia y siempre lo mismo

(Translated by Google)
The service is good (like most), but it takes over 10 minutes to fill up... very slow. The gas isn't the cheapest like at other stations. There's no system for adding points to your account. They only offer emergency refueling, and it's always the same.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqdnFUUDNRRRAB
